Careers

Because of our rapid growth we are constantly looking for talented individuals for our dinning rooms and kitchen, please contact us.

We are currently hiring in all areas of the restaurant. Curry Chef, Tandoori Chef, Halwai(sweets maker), Prep. Chef, dishwasher, dinning room managers and bus people.

Thank you kindly and we look forward to working with you. At receipt of your resume we will contact you to arrange an interview.

We currently have locations in Winnipeg and Ottawa and are hiring at all locations. Thank you!

Curry Cook

Looking for an experienced South Asian cook. Must have minimum of 2-3 years experience in cooking South Asian cuisine.

Salary: $19.50/hour + benefits, 35 hours per week
Anticipated Start Date: As soon as possible
Location: Winnipeg, Manitoba (  1 vacancy )
Experience: 2 – 3 years
Languages: English
Work Setting: Restaurant
Cuisine Specialties: South Asian

Duties will include
Prepare and cook full course meals;
Plan menus;
Prepare dishes for customers with food allergies or intolerance;
Inspect kitchens and food service areas;
Train staff in preparation of food;
Order supplies and equipment;
Maintain inventory and records of food, supplies and equipment;
Work with specialized cooking equipment (deep fryer, etc.);
Clean kitchen and work areas;
Organize and
